sources.title: Guru, the Mad Monk 1970 - Death His Religion...Blood His Satisfaction! | Andy Milligan Horror Movie
sources.description:
Meet Guru (Neil Flanagan) – a 15th-century prison chaplain with a very flexible moral compass. By day, he preaches purity. By night? Grave-robbing, torture sessions, and cozy coffin dates with his vampire lover Olga (Jaqueline Webb). When guard Carl (Paul Lieber) and fugitive Nadja (Judith Israel) get tangled in his web, the blood really starts to flow…

🎬 CREDITS
Directed and Written by: Andy Milligan
Release date: September 1970

⭐️STARRING
Neil Flanagan - Guru
Jaqueline Webb - Olga
Paul Lieber - Carl
Judith Israel - Nadja
Maggie Rogers - Agatha

💀 TRIVIA 
✔️ Shot in 6 days for just $11,000 in Milligan’s Staten Island basement!
✔️ Features handmade costumes stitched by Milligan himself between takes.

https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=UUMOycDFnpMeWzaITQSD1dWsOA

@CultCinemaClassics

metadata.Plot: On the island of Mortavia in 1480, Father Guru is the schizophrenic chaplain of a Central European prison whom murders anyone he thinks threatens him including his mistress, a vampire, a hunchback and others. Carl is the jailer whom robs graves for the mad priest and saves one women prisoner, Najia, whom is condemned to death for infanticide.
metadata.Actors: Neil Flanagan, Jaqueline Webb, Judith Israel
